10.reason: [Incorrect range checks: should ensure both ends are of same type, e.g., a[i-1] >= 'a' && a[i+1] <= 'z' && a[i-1] <= 'z' && a[i+1] >= 'a', but current logic allows mixed types like '0' and 'z'. Also, accessing a[i-1] when i=0 leads to undefined behavior (buffer underflow).]
